Multi-branch, multi-currency. Built for: Multi-branch, multi-currency. Built for serious trading.

Append-only record of who changed what. Read-only.
Cash movements per branch and currency: Cash movements per branch and currency
Operating branches and their cash treasu: Operating branches and their cash treasuries
Branch-level cash movements, transfers a: Branch-level cash movements, transfers and expenses
Company details, exchange rates and syst: Company details, exchange rates and system info
All rates are expressed against 1 USD. E: All rates are expressed against 1 USD. Every change is recorded in the audit log.
Staff accounts that can log into the bac: Staff accounts that can log into the back office
Transactions imported from the legacy le: Transactions imported from the legacy ledger, excluded from balance recompute
Reconcile treasury entries against clien: Reconcile treasury entries against client-side transactions
Containers, received goods and outbound: Containers, received goods and outbound shipments
Compares the cached running balance agai: Compares the cached running balance against the sum of transactions. Discrepancies are flagged for investigation.
Show only rows with a discrepancy: Show only rows with a discrepancy
No discrepancies found on this page. Pag: No discrepancies found on this page. Page through to inspect the rest.
Balance-sheet rows show current balances: Balance-sheet rows show current balances; P&L rows show activity within the selected period. Owner's equity is the balancing plug.
Outstanding client balances bucketed by: Outstanding client balances bucketed by days since last activity. Negative numbers mean the client owes the company.
Close a month to prevent further inserts: Close a month to prevent further inserts dated within it. Closed months can be reopened with an audit-logged reason.
Close this period? Inserts dated within: Close this period? Inserts dated within it will be blocked.
Capture daily cash counts per branch and: Capture daily cash counts per branch and currency. Variance against the system balance can be posted as an adjustment.
Post a treasury adjustment for the varia: Post a treasury adjustment for the variance?
Every change to the EUR\/LYD\/CNY rates: Every change to the EUR/LYD/CNY rates is snapshotted here. Use this when restating historical figures or reconciling FX gain/loss.
Client deposits with the \"Prepayment re: Client deposits with the "Prepayment received" purpose can be tracked here and partially applied to future transactions.
Applied to (container number, transactio: Applied to (container number, transaction ref, etc.)
Company owners and their shares. Treasur: Company owners and their shares. Treasury transactions tagged with an owner purpose can be linked to a specific owner.
Two views: receivables (clients who owe: Two views: receivables (clients who owe us) and client deposits we hold (we owe them service). Bucketed by days since the client's last transaction.
These clients have negative balances (ov: These clients have negative balances (overdrawn). Amounts shown as absolute values.
Positive balances — money the client has: Positive balances — money the client has on deposit that we owe back as service. Aged by last activity to surface dormant prepayments.
Reporting currency split is reported per: Reporting currency split is reported per balance; FX restatement uses rates from the FX history log.
Per-currency balances; consolidation req: Per-currency balances; consolidation requires FX restatement at the reporting rate.
Every client, treasury, supplier, and br: Every client, treasury, supplier, and broker transaction on the selected date, in chronological order. Use it for end-of-day review.
Direct method — figures derived from the: Direct method — figures derived from the cash ledger (branches_transactions). Per-currency view; no FX consolidation.
Two views: prepayments out (asset) and w: Two views: prepayments out (asset) and what we owe (liability). Bucketed by days since the last transaction with that counterparty.
Prepaid to suppliers (we paid, awaiting: Prepaid to suppliers (we paid, awaiting delivery)
Prepaid to customs brokers (we paid, awa: Prepaid to customs brokers (we paid, awaiting service)
Accounts payable — customs brokers (we o: Accounts payable — customs brokers (we owe them)
The standard accounts the trial balance: The standard accounts the trial balance derives from. System accounts cannot be removed.
Derived from journal_lines — totals bala: Derived from journal_lines — totals balance by construction. The earlier "Trial Balance" derives from entity tables; this one is the authoritative DR/CR view.
Per-currency DR = CR — books are balance: Per-currency DR = CR — books are balanced.
Every cash-affecting mutation appends a: Every cash-affecting mutation appends a balanced DR/CR entry here. Reversed entries are kept (append-only) but excluded from the trial balance.
Side-by-side comparison: journal-derived: Side-by-side comparison: journal-derived net balance vs entity-table-derived figure for every account. Drift means a mutation updated one side but not the other — either a wiring gap or an unbackfilled historical row.
No derivation key — not auto-derived fro: No derivation key — not auto-derived from entity tables
Journal column: SUM(DR) − SUM(CR) on thi: Journal column: SUM(DR) − SUM(CR) on this account_code in the journal (open entries only).
Entity column: the figure the original t: Entity column: the figure the original trial balance derives from balances on clients/suppliers/brokers/branches plus today's P&L rows.
Drift: journal − entity. Green = journal: Drift: journal − entity. Green = journal records more activity than entity; red = entity has activity the journal missed.
\"manual\" accounts have no derivation_k: "manual" accounts have no derivation_key — they need explicit posting and don't appear in the entity-derived trial balance, so their entity column is always 0.
Optional line at the bottom of every rec: Optional line at the bottom of every receipt — e.g. thank-you note or return policy
Trips, received goods and outbound shipm: Trips, received goods and outbound shipments
e.g. SHIP — 2-5 letters\/digits, auto-de: e.g. SHIP — 2-5 letters/digits, auto-derived from company name if blank
Appears in front of every tracking code,: Appears in front of every tracking code, e.g. PREFIX-AB12-CD34-EF56. Defaults to your company initials.
Sourced from journal_lines — totals bala: Sourced from journal_lines — totals balance by construction. P&L, Balance Sheet and Cash Flow PDFs all read from the same journal, so what you see here is what those reports add up to.
Sourced from journal_lines (open entries: Sourced from journal_lines (open entries only). Reversed entries are excluded by construction.
This prints a sticker for every piece of: This prints a sticker for every piece of every shipment in this container. Enter the print confirmation PIN to proceed.
Operators must enter this PIN to print a: Operators must enter this PIN to print all stickers for a container at once. Leave blank to keep the current PIN.
Revenue from shipping commission and FX: Revenue from shipping commission and FX over a date range
Direct method — figures sourced from jou: Direct method — figures sourced from journal_lines (cash account 1000). Per-currency view; no FX consolidation.
Short label, e.g. 50 LED bulbs from Yiwu: Short label, e.g. 50 LED bulbs from Yiwu
Used only when no supplier selected abov: Used only when no supplier selected above
Commission posts to CoA 4020 when you ac: Commission posts to CoA 4020 when you accept a quote below.
No sourcing commissions posted in this p: No sourcing commissions posted in this period.
Live cash on hand per branch per currenc: Live cash on hand per branch per currency, with the most recent cash-count drift.
No revenue posted against this container: No revenue posted against this container yet.
No expenses posted against this containe: No expenses posted against this container yet.
Asset \/ liability flows tagged to this: Asset / liability flows tagged to this container — usually AR / AP that will settle later.
In the current model, supplier and broke: In the current model, supplier and broker payments land in prepayment asset accounts (1200 / 1300) — they only become formal expenses when explicitly recognized. Until that recognition step is added, "Cash settled" is the most realistic per-container cost figure; "Net" reflects pure P&L accruals.
Why this commission, e.g. wire-transfer: Why this commission, e.g. wire-transfer fee, FX margin, processing
Shown on the journal entry so the accoun: Shown on the journal entry so the accountant can trace what this commission is for.
Commission reason is required when commi: Commission reason is required when commission > 0
Title: Title
Require approval for client deposits and: Require approval for client deposits and withdraws
When ON, every new client deposit \/ wit: When ON, every new client deposit / withdraw is created as PENDING — an admin must approve it before it touches the ledger or the client balance. When OFF, transactions post immediately.
No items yet. Add the first product to b: No items yet. Add the first product to build the proforma.
In commission_mode=hidden_in_prices, inc: In commission_mode=hidden_in_prices, include the markup here. In visible mode, leave equal to unit cost and add commission below.
JPG \/ PNG \/ WEBP, up to 5 MB each, max: JPG / PNG / WEBP, up to 5 MB each, max 10 at once
No installments yet. Pick a plan above t: No installments yet. Pick a plan above to generate the schedule.

Used only when mode is visible.
Wallet: no new journal entry. Cash: post: Wallet: no new journal entry. Cash: posts a client deposit linked to this proforma.
Defaults to the installment amount. Set: Defaults to the installment amount. Set lower for a partial payment.
Skip re-entering — the items, weights an: Skip re-entering — the items, weights and client are already here. Pick a container to load them into.

No installments match the current filter: No installments match the current filters.

What we charge the client for shipping: What we charge the client for shipping

No journal activity tagged to this profo: No journal activity tagged to this proforma yet. Sourcing revenue posts on Mark Fulfilled.
No freight container yet. Use Send to fr: No freight container yet. Use Send to freight on the proforma to create one and the shipping side will start populating here.
Container created but no journal activit: Container created but no journal activity yet — happens when client_withd or supplier_deposit posts for this container.
Note: supplier \/ broker payments land i: Note: supplier / broker payments land in prepayment asset accounts (1200 / 1300) and only become formal expense when explicitly recognised. "Cash settled" above is the realistic cost; "Net" reflects pure P&L accruals.

Allowed range −99 to +1000. Use a negati: Allowed range −99 to +1000. Use a negative number to set discounted pricing below cost.
Also save to product catalog (reuse next: Also save to product catalog (reuse next time)
Reusable products that pre-fill the Add: Reusable products that pre-fill the Add item form on a proforma
Catalog is empty. Add items here, or tic: Catalog is empty. Add items here, or tick "Also save to catalog" while creating proforma items.
Stage-by-stage conversion, dwell time, a: Stage-by-stage conversion, dwell time, and stuck deals
Calculated from sent_at and approved_at: Calculated from sent_at and approved_at on each proforma in the window.
No POs linked yet. Link a Purchase Order: No POs linked yet. Link a Purchase Order so supplier-side status flows through to this proforma.

Items where promised date has passed wit: Items where promised date has passed without delivery, or supplier confirmed for a later date than promised.
No versions yet. A snapshot is automatic: No versions yet. A snapshot is automatically captured when the proforma is sent, approved, or fulfilled.
No differences detected between these ve: No differences detected between these versions.
On-time rate, avg lead time, cancellatio: On-time rate, avg lead time, cancellation rate per supplier — derived from purchase_orders + linked proforma items
No POs with supplier_name on record. Lin: No POs with supplier_name on record. Link POs to proformas to populate this report.
On-time rate counts items where supplier: On-time rate counts items where supplier_confirmed_date ≤ promised_delivery_date. Cancel rate = (CANCELLED + RETURNED + REFUNDED) / total POs.
Sourced from journal_lines as of report: Sourced from journal_lines as of report date. Per-currency view; consolidation requires FX restatement at the reporting rate.
